summary: Iteration 5 — re-tested the backend after the incremental additions (shareable-quote routes + AWS SDK v3 storage drop-in + Cloudflare-aware .env). Added a new test file covering all 7 review points and re-ran the full regression. Result: 65/65 PASS (58 prior + 7 new). Zero regressions. Swagger paths confirmed at 45 (two new share paths present). Redis share key TTL verified at exactly 604800s (7 days) via redis-cli. Storage mock path unchanged externally when S3_* env is empty. Frontend not tested per request.
critical_code_review_comments: SHARE ROUTE VERIFIED: POST /quotes/:id/share issues a base64url-safe 8-char slug (randomBytes(6).base64url), writes key `qshare:<slug>` to Redis with TTL=604800s, returns {slug, shareUrl:/q/<slug>, expiresAt}. Redis TTL asserted live — exactly 604800. Two successive share calls on the same quoteId produce two distinct slugs that both resolve (no idempotency dedup, which is the intended design).

PUBLIC FETCH VERIFIED: GET /quotes/s/:slug strips `userId` and `contact` from the underlying quote and narrows `profile` to only {city, state}; sensitive fields (monthlyIncome, cibilScore) are not leaked. `sharedVia` field equals the slug. Returns the full offers array, bestOffer (with emi block), offersCount. Confirmed via destructured rest-spread in QuotesService.getBySlug().

ERROR ENVELOPES VERIFIED: POST /quotes/BADID/share -> 404 with error envelope (success:false, error.code set). GET /quotes/s/<unknown-slug> -> 404 with error envelope. Both flow through the standard NestJS NotFoundException -> global filter.

STORAGE DEGRADES CLEANLY: POST /documents/presign still returns the legacy mock shape when S3_* env is empty — {storageKey, key, uploadUrl, method:'PUT', headers, expiresInSec}, and uploadUrl starts with '/api/v1/documents/mock-upload/'. The AWS SDK v3 code path is compiled in but dormant until creds are provided. storageKey === key (presign alias fix from iter-2 still green).
SWAGGER COUNT VERIFIED: /api/v1/docs-json lists 45 paths (up from 43 in iter-4). Both /quotes/{id}/share and /quotes/s/{slug} are present and tagged under Quotes.
NO REGRESSION: iter-1 (10) + iter-2 (23) + iter-3 quotes (14) + iter-4 optional-auth (11) all still green — 58/58 unchanged. Plus 7 new iter-5 tests = 65/65.

MINOR OBSERVATION (not a defect): QuotesService.createShare() does not dedup — calling it twice returns two different live slugs, both pointing to the same quote. This is the intended design (each share link can be revoked independently by waiting out TTL), but worth calling out in the API docs so consumers don't assume stable slugs per quote.

MINOR OBSERVATION (not a defect): getBySlug() keeps `profile` narrowed to {city, state} but does not redact the city/state explicitly — if those ever need to be considered PII (location-tracking concerns), move them behind a feature flag. Currently they're exposed in the public view per the spec.

CODE QUALITY: QuotesService.createShare() calls getById(id) first (throws 404 if quote is missing/expired), then issues the slug — correct ordering, prevents orphan slugs pointing to nothing. randomBytes(6).toString('base64url') yields URL-safe 8-char slugs with ~48 bits of entropy (~2.8e14 combinations) — acceptable for a 7-day window, but if abuse becomes a concern, bump to 9–12 bytes.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_quotes_share_and_storage.py (NEW — 7 tests: share slug shape/TTL, 404 envelopes for share-on-missing & public-fetch-unknown, two-distinct-slugs resolving, PII stripping on authed & anon quotes, storage mock-mode presign shape)
test_credentials: Seeded accounts from /app/memory/test_credentials.md (admin@credupe.local / Admin@12345, customer@credupe.local / Customer@123, partner@credupe.local / Partner@123). Unchanged.
seed_data_creation: None. New tests create transient quotes and share slugs (both Redis-only, auto-expire in 24h and 7d respectively). Anon-quote payloads prefixed with TEST_ in fullName/email to remain identifiable.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Run `pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v --junitxml=/app/test_reports/pytest/pytest_results.xml`. Expect 65/65. Canaries for the iter-5 additions live in tests/test_quotes_share_and_storage.py — specifically test_share_returns_slug_url_and_expiry (slug shape + 7d expiry) and test_public_fetch_returns_offers_and_strips_pii (PII redaction). Share slugs live under Redis key `qshare:<slug>` with TTL=604800. Storage presign is still mock (uploadUrl prefix `/api/v1/documents/mock-upload/`) until S3_* env vars are populated.
rca of the issue: N/A — no defects found in this iteration. All 7 review points verified against live endpoints and Redis, plus full regression passes at 65/65.
